title: Selling Plugins Without a Payment Processor: Which Option Actually Works for You Without the Gatekeepers
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: You're a Nigerian digital creator facing a harsh reality: PayPal and Stripe have blocked your account. This means you can't sell your plugins on popular platforms like Gumroad or Payhip. The reasons vary, but the impact is clear: you're missing out on revenue and a larger audience. You're not alone. Others in restricted countries face the same struggle. In this article, we'll explore a solution that bypasses these gatekeepers and helps you get paid without the hassle. Let's dive into the details.
What Each Option Actually Offers

The options available to you as a digital creator in a restricted country are limited. You can opt for traditional payment processors, which often come with hefty fees and strict requirements. Alternatively, you can choose the NOWPayments gateway, which offers instant automated delivery and no KYC (Know Your Customer) restrictions. This means you can sell your plugins directly to your customers without worrying about their financial information. However, some platforms might require you to adapt to their payment systems, which can be time-consuming and limiting. Others, like Unchained Commerce, offer a full-stack solution that includes backend services, wallet integration, and admin dashboards, providing a more comprehensive approach to selling digital products without the need for traditional payment processors.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

Traditional payment processors often exclude countries due to regulatory requirements or perceived risk. This leaves you with limited options for selling your plugins. NOWPayments, on the other hand, supports over 300 cryptocurrencies and doesn't require KYC, making it a viable option for restricted countries. However, this also means you'll need to handle customer support and potential disputes yourself. Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle provides a more robust solution, as it includes transaction logs, order management, and real-time analytics, making it easier to manage sales and customer interactions in restricted countries.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

When using traditional payment processors, you're often charged high fees, which can eat into your profits. NOWPayments offers instant automated delivery, which means your customers receive their plugins quickly and securely. However, you'll still need to pay fees to NOWPayments, which can range from 0.5% to 1.5% depending on the payment method. Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle provides a more transparent pricing model, with fixed fees and no hidden costs. This means you can focus on selling your plugins without worrying about surprise fees or complicated payment structures.
Traditional payment processors often prioritize security over flexibility, leaving you with limited options for selling digital products.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

Automation is key when selling digital products. NOWPayments offers instant automated delivery, which means your customers receive their plugins as soon as they make a payment. Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle takes this a step further, providing a comprehensive backend service that handles delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts for you. This means you can focus on creating and marketing your plugins, while Unchained Commerce handles the technical aspects of sales and delivery.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

If you're looking for a simple solution that doesn't require much technical expertise, NOWPayments might be a good option. However, if you're looking for a more comprehensive solution that includes backend services, wallet integration, and admin dashboards, Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle is likely a better choice. Consider your specific needs and goals, and choose the option that best aligns with your business objectives.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The most common question we get is, 'Will I get blocked again if I use NOWPayments or Unchained Commerce?' The answer is, it's unlikely. Both NOWPayments and Unchained Commerce are designed to work with cryptocurrencies, which are less regulated than traditional payment methods. However, it's always possible that you might encounter issues or restrictions. We recommend keeping an eye on your account and reaching out to customer support if you have any concerns.
NOWPayments and Unchained Commerce offer instant automated delivery, but you'll still need to handle customer support and potential disputes.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're interested in exploring more topics related to selling digital products without payment processors, be sure to check out our article on using crypto-native infrastructure for digital creators. We also offer a range of resources and tools, including our Full Stack Bundle, which provides a comprehensive solution for selling plugins, ebooks, and other digital products. With Unchained Commerce, you can focus on creating and marketing your products, while we handle the technical aspects of sales and delivery.
Your Action Checklist

To get started with selling your plugins without a payment processor, follow these steps: 1. Choose a solution that aligns with your business objectives, such as NOWPayments or Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle. 2. Set up your account and integrate the payment gateway with your plugin sales platform. 3. Test your payment flow to ensure it works correctly. 4. Create a marketing plan to promote your plugins and attract customers. 5. Monitor your sales and customer interactions to ensure a smooth experience.
